description: A security audit requires bringing the payment processing platform's Kubernetes Secrets into compliance based on the specification at /home/ga/Desktop/secrets_spec.md. Update the 'payment-db-credentials' secret in the 'payment' namespace with the correct password. Relocate the 'stripe-api-keys' secret from the 'default' namespace to the 'payment' namespace using the values from the spec. Create a 'frontend-tls' secret of type 'kubernetes.io/tls' in the 'web' namespace using the certificate and key files located at /home/ga/Desktop/tls/. Create a new 'inter-service-token' Opaque secret in both the 'payment' and 'web' namespaces containing the JWT token from the spec. Access is available via the Rancher UI (https://localhost, credentials admin / Admin12345678!) or the terminal.
